bugs.title: Youtube: Multiple Channels
bugs.description: If the playing Youtube Video has multiple channels, it will say "Unknown Author".

bugs.title: Youtube Music Popup
bugs.description: Sometimes if Youtube Music streams the Browsing Activities and you leave and re-enter the page, it will show a popup. Don't worry it doesn't reset the time or so, it only shows you the TOAST again.

bugs.title: Youtube Music: Time Reset
bugs.description: If you seek in a song, minimize or maximize the window, it sets the time to 0 again. It resets when you pause and unpause or when the song changes.

bugs.title: Browsing Activities Popup
bugs.description: Even if you disabled the RPC, it will still show the popup when it WOULD stream Brwosing Activities. It doesn't actually stream anything, but still shows it.

bugs.title: Incorrect Native App Version shown
bugs.description: For some reason, the Extension currently shows the Native App Version as 1.1.10 even though it is Version 1.1.0. This is just a display issue, you do have the Version 1.1.0.
